signals.title: OpenPayd ontvangt MiCA-licentie voor crypto-diensten in Europa
signals.summary: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.

signals.title: ECB integreert niet-financiële vorderingen in algemeen onderpandstelsel
signals.summary: ECB to integrate non-financial credit claim portfolios into general collateral framework, phasing out temporary measures

signals.title: Poolse cryptobeurs Kanga krijgt MiCA-licentie in Letland
signals.summary: Poland-founded crypto exchange Kanga has secured a Class 3 MiCA license in Latvia, enabling EU-wide crypto services as Polish lawmakers debate framework's implementation.

signals.title: Ripple's RLUSD-stablecoin gelanceerd in Japan na goedkeuring
signals.summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin goes live in Japan after regulatory approval

signals.title: Ripple lanceert RLUSD-stablecoin in Japan na regelgeving goedkeuring
signals.summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin is available through SBI VC Trade for both institutional and retail users in the country.

signals.title: Abracadabra verhoogt rentevoeten door MIM-stablecoin depeg
signals.summary: The protocol is raising interest rates across all Cauldrons to encourage debt repayment and reduce supply.

signals.title: Binance trekt Griekse MiCA-aanvraag in maar blijft in Europa actief
signals.summary: Binance withdraws Greek MiCA bid but vows to remain in Europe

signals.title: Amerikaanse kredietverenigingen met 25 miljard dollar testen stablecoin-betalingen
signals.summary: A new pilot from Stablecore, Circuit and Curql gives participating US credit unions access to test stablecoin payments and other digital asset services.
